Tamil Nadu.Potato___Early_blight: High humidity in Tamil Nadu increases fungal spread. Spray fungicide earlier.
Tamil Nadu.Tomato___Early_blight: Monsoon conditions favor early blight in Tamil Nadu. Ensure proper spacing for ventilation.
Tamil Nadu.Potato___Late_blight: Hill regions of Tamil Nadu are prone to late blight. Use resistant varieties.
Tamil Nadu.Tomato___Late_blight: High rainfall periods in Tamil Nadu are critical. Apply protective sprays.

Punjab.Potato___Early_blight: Dry climate in Punjab reduces fungal spread but intensive irrigation may increase risk.
Punjab.Tomato___Early_blight: Morning dew in Punjab winters can trigger early blight. Avoid overhead irrigation.
Punjab.Potato___Late_blight: Late blight in Punjab is common during foggy days. Monitor lower leaves closely.
Punjab.Tomato___Late_blight: Frost protection is as important as disease management in Punjab winters.

Maharashtra.Potato___Early_blight: Warm climate in Maharashtra accelerates disease progression. Monitor frequently.
Maharashtra.Tomato___Early_blight: Post-monsoon humidity in Maharashtra is a risk factor. Use mulch to prevent soil splash.
Maharashtra.Potato___Late_blight: Cooler nights in Maharashtra's plateau regions favor late blight. Apply copper-based sprays.
Maharashtra.Tomato___Late_blight: Unexpected winter rains in Maharashtra can lead to rapid spread. Stay alert.
